description: Initial state: sum of 9 ns/call values
Clean baseline with BF disabled
Manual unroll hull scan by 4 - hurt MSVC vectorizer
restrict + explicit dot in hull scan - broke auto-unroll
two-pass hull scan: 2x dot products kills perf
precompute inv_rot for box/hull, precompute cylinder axis unit vector
forceinline gjk_support and gjk_closest_point
forceinline gjk_center and gjk_witness_points
forceinline simplex solvers - icache pressure hurt
remove forceinline from center/witness (user request, perf improved)
AVX2: 3x worse on hulls from misaligned v3 loads
GJK_SUPPORT macro replaces forceinline (user request, debug+release benefit)
GJK_CLOSEST_POINT macro
lowercase macros + incremental max_vert2 (cylinder-box 344->322)
eliminate double neg in support + simplify progress to dsq-dot(w,closest)
skip simplex backup on count=1 (capsule-cap 51->46)
LTCG/GL: changed inlining decisions, hurt box+cylinder
reuse ab vector in gjk_solve2
partial simplex backup: only copy active vertices
if-chain simplex dispatch (cleaner, same perf)
precompute inv_divisor: moves division, doesn't eliminate it, larger struct
forceinline quat_rotate (defensive, ensures inlining)
split feat IDs from vertex: 25 solver shuffles need mirroring, too invasive
forceinline gjk_distance: massive code bloat from inlining entire GJK at every call site
SoA hull layout: 3 cache streams worse than AoS for large hulls
SSE s3 type in simplex: s3_load/store conversion overhead kills gains
padded v3 to 16B SSE: hull scan 2x worse from cache bloat (12KB->16KB)
SSE v3 (padded 16B) + mul/shuffle dot (not dpps) + 4-wide hull scan
SSE v3 + SoA large hull scan + AoS transpose small hull + mul/shuffle dot
SSE quat_rotate with mask: _mm_and_ps mask constant killed perf
v3_dot_m broadcast + v3_scale_m + SSE quat_rotate pipeline
SSE closest_point: compiler already auto-vectorizes this
8-wide SoA hull scan (2x SSE accumulators, ILP)
max-only scan: index recovery doubles work
incremental index counters (paddd vs 4x scalar moves)
bitmask region dispatch in solve2/solve3 (fewer branches)
rsqrt+Newton for cylinder: ~same speed as sqrtf on modern CPUs
wABC=-(u+v) identity: float rounding causes wrong Voronoi region selection
branchless solve2: always-write cost + mask creation overhead
SoA simplex: 6 separate copies not faster than 1 struct copy
branchless solve2 XOR select: always-pay cost on common edge path
sel_ps in support: mask construction more expensive than cmov
_mm_max_ss for max_vert2: compiler already uses maxss
extract hull scan to function: reduces icache pressure in gjk_distance
rotation matrix for box/hull support: 3 dots vs quat_rotate
rotation matrix + clean macro (mat3 dot 42% fewer ops than quat_rotate)
SSE mat3 rotate: no scalar extraction, pure __m128 pipeline
shuffle broadcast in hull scan (box blendv reverted)
XOR sign flip: capsule-box regressed 65->73
HILL CLIMBING hull support O(sqrt(n)): hull-1000v 295->85 (3.5x)
loosen progress eps 1e-7->1e-6: cylinder-box 284->239 (6.0 vs 7.3 iters)
progress eps 1e-5: cylinder-box 239->207 (5.1 iters)
progress eps 1e-4: cylinder-box 4.2 iters, 180ns
rsqrt+Newton cylinder: no faster than sqrtss+divss on modern CPUs
forceinline box/cylinder: icache pressure hurt hulls
warm-start hill climbing: hull-200v 95->78 (previous best as start)
lower hill climb threshold 32->8: hull-20v 100->92
always hill climb when edges available (simplifies code)
transpose rotate for inverse: -48B struct, 8 vs 12 SSE ops
transpose+broadcast forward rotate: better ILP than horizontal sums
uint16 feat: alignment issues, noisy results
column-form rotation matrix: fast 8-op forward, fewer iterations
skip zero-init simplex: saves ~250 bytes memset per call
skip result init
branchless cylinder: mid+half_axis XOR sign, direct center return
precompute segment dir: 1 subps savings offset by larger struct
New motion-based perf tests (shapes rotate+translate each iter)
cache vert-edge table per hull: hull-1000v 1600->393 (4.1x!!)
skip SoA build when hill climbing: hull-1000v 393->210 (47%!!!)
lazy hull scaling: O(1) support vs O(n) pre-scale. hull-1000v 210->111
Clean motion baseline: constructor + gjk_distance + integration
warm-start separating direction cache (v3* cache param)
New 25-pair benchmark (5 prim-prim + 5 shape types x 4 hull sizes)
/Ob3 aggressive inlining (MSVC)
reuse sep vector in post-hoc radius + /Ob3 for main target
gjk_witness_points macro (switch-based, no loop)
cached center field in GJK_Shape: +16B struct offset gains
SSE sqrt+div pipeline in cylinder support (xmm registers)
SSE box support (copysign via XOR, movemask for feat bits)
eliminate simplex backup (solvers don't modify before returning 0)
max_vert2 init from v[0]: noise, no clear gain
wrapper+inner restrict: killed inlining, doubled all times
pointer API + GJK_Cache struct with hull vertex hints (-14.8%!!)
skip len2 check on cached path (cleaner code)
noinline simplex solvers (reduce icache pressure)
__restrict on support function pointer params

2-vertex seed: extra support cost outweighs iteration savings
